---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new calculation, system, or API improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Motivation

What are you trying to do, and why is it not possible (or awkward) today?

## Proposed solution

Describe the API or behavior you would like.

## Numerology reference

If this is a new calculation or system, please describe the rules (letter
tables, reduction, master numbers, accent handling) and, if possible, a
reference. Keep any examples free of personal data.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds or alternative designs you have thought about.
